---
title: "Gov51-ps4"
author: "Yahir Ramirez"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 1.) Project Setup

<https://github.com/Yahir2026/gov51-ps4.git>

# PS4 - Gov 51

## 1 Setup and Exploration (10 points)

### 1.1.1 Load packages and data

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

gay <- read_csv("~/Desktop/Senior Spring/Gov 51/Weekly Assignments/gov51-ps4/data/raw/card1995.csv")
```
